description.value:
Baseline (0 Spirituality): For 10 minutes (concentration), your perception locks onto value, concealment seams, and behavioral tells. As an action, scan creatures and containers within 30 feet. Make a Spirituality (Perception or Investigation) check against DC 12 (or against a target's passive Deception if actively masking intent). On success, identify which scanned target currently carries the highest-value portable item, and gain +1d4 on your next check this scene to locate hidden compartments, forged paperwork, or exploitable wording tied to that target.

Loophole Clause: If you can quote a literal phrase from a posted rule, contract, or spoken order that leaves ambiguity, you may use Charisma (Deception) instead of Spirituality for this scan.

Higher Spend (upcast):

  • +1 Spirituality: Range increases to 60 feet, and you learn one item category on a scanned target (key, coin, document, charm, weapon).
  • +2 Spirituality: Mark one scanned target for 1 hour. Your first Sleight of Hand or Deception check against that target gains advantage.
  • +4 Spirituality: During the scan, you also detect one hidden creature or hidden compartment in range if it contains something materially valuable; additionally, choose one scanned target and learn the exact pocket, sheath, or container currently holding its highest-value portable item.

Counterplay: Worthless decoys, anti-divination wards, and strict sensory denial (darkness, silence, heavy obstruction) can block or mislead this read at GM discretion.

Corruption Hook: If you knowingly violate an agreement immediately after using Superior Observation to exploit it, gain 1 Corruption.

Legacy Upgrade (Sequence 7 - Scope)

At Sequence 7, Superior Observation can read subtle clues and traces normally missed by common observers. If cast with at least +1 Spirituality, choose one extra output: concealed recent interaction (within 1 hour), hidden transfer route between two holders, or forged-document stress marks. If cast with at least +2 Spirituality, you may preserve one observed clue as a "decoded anchor" for 10 minutes; your next Decryption check tied to that anchor has advantage.
